description: 1 repository + 3 depth-ordered directories (the #4019 nested-directory regression cassette). FirstGeneration=true so the retract and repository_cleanup phases are empty. Budgets are the exact deterministic counts the production canonical writer produces for this scenario (4 atomic-write events across the repository, directories, and directory_edges phases plus the overall write; 5 executed statements), so any increase — an N+1 or extra-phase regression — trips the gate and must be refreshed deliberately via the R-6 path.
